name: Pork Chops with Creamy Gravy and Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 10 3.5 oz Can cream of celery soup
1 1.5 cups Frozen potatoes with onions and peppers (from 24 oz package)
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a large nonstick skillet with nonstick cooking spray. Heat over medium-high heat until hot. Sprinkle pork chops with seasoned salt; add to skillet. Cook 5 to 6 minutes or until browned on both sides. Remove chops from skillet; cover to keep warm.
2. In a medium bowl, combine sour cream, soup and sage; mix well. Add to skillet; stir in frozen vegetables. Arrange chops over vegetable mixture; gently press into the mixture. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low; cover and cook 10 to 15 minutes or until pork chops are tender, stirring occasionally.
